docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUTCHINSON, LEONNA
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES /ADDITIONAL FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUTCHINSON, LEONNA HEARING SET FOR NOV-12-2025 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON NOV-12-2025 IN DEPT. 206 - HEARING ON APPLICANT LEONNA HUTCHINSON'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEE AND EXPENSES ONLY; DENIED AS TO COURT-APPOINTED INTERPRETER WITHOUT PREJUDICE, FEE FOR A PEACE OFFICER TO TESTIFY IN COURT AND FEE FOR COURT APPOINTED EXPERTS, AND OTHER FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST, CLERK: V WU, NOT REPORTED (D206)

FRAUD, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUTCHINSON, LEONNA AS TO DEFENDANT ANDROID INC. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-01-2026 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-26-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-09-2026
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUTCHINSON, LEONNA
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF HUTCHINSON, LEONNA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-01-2026 CONTINUED TO JUN-03-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-14-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-03-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
